first_slide_hook: Two minutes before your next meeting? Reset here.

slides.visual_beat: Luna beside an open laptop with a visible calendar alert.
Tense shoulders and shallow desk posture.
slides.text_overlay: When you have no time for a full workout

slides.visual_beat: Three simple standing moves shown as visual steps.
slides.viewer_job: Understand the action without extra explanation.

slides.visual_beat: Luna returns to the laptop calmer and more upright.
slides.text_overlay: Back to the meeting, less braced.

creator_continuity: Keep Luna's warm, practical tone across all slides.
Use the same apartment desk setting and outfit.
generation_notes: Each slide should work as a vertical still.
Avoid dense text; let body position and laptop context carry the story.
